title: markhamia platycalyx
intro: Markhamia platycalyx, also known as the African Devil Tree or White Milk Tree, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Markhamia platycalyx include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
